nasb.text: These all with one mind were continually devoting themselves to prayer, along with the women, and Mary the mother of Jesus, and with His brothers.

esv.text: All these with one accord were devoting themselves to prayer, together with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus, and his brothers.

cnv.text: 這些人和幾個婦女，耶穌的母親馬利亞，還有他的兄弟們，都在一起，同心地恆切禱告。

ccb.text: 他们和耶稣的母亲玛丽亚、耶稣的弟弟们及几个妇女在一起同心合意地恒切祷告。

csbs.text: 这些人与一些妇女以及耶稣的母亲玛丽亚、耶稣的兄弟们一起，都同心合意地恒切祷告。
